steps.title: Treat the expression as one value
steps.content:
The question asks for $7-3x$, so let $u=7-3x$. The equation becomes simpler.
$$5u+4=4u+23$$

steps.title: Solve for the target
steps.content:
Subtract $4u$ from both sides, then subtract $4$ from both sides.
$$u+4=23$$
$$u=19$$
The answer is D.
